markdownRemark.html:
End of FTTA (Spring 2022)

  • I'll let my mentor know that I'm interested in being with P (obviously don't say too much about our history). Ideally P will still be open to being with me at that time
  • When I'm finally able to be with her again, I will BREAK DOWN IN TEARS. We'll finally be able to start courting again.

Rest of 2022

  • I'll most likely propose to her at one of the Seven Feasts, like the Thanksgiving conference or even the Winter Training if necessary
  • Maybe during this time I can finally go to SG and visit her family (it'll literally be like Crazy Rich Asians)
  • By this point I'll have saved up enough to have a decent wedding. I don't really care much for super extravagant stuff. A lot of the older sisters are good at planning for this stuff so I trust they can take care of it. Of course, P is worthy of me spoiling her.

  • I'll be planning out how we'll spend out first year together

    • Traveling and taking advantage of our youth to visit many localities and saints
    • I'll be leveraging my online business (personal brand) to support us
  • During this time P will be busy with her internship and I'll be working on my money umbrella

Spring 2023

  • If things work out well, we'll get married someone in the first half of 2023.
  • Instead of just a mere honeymoon, we can jumpstart our first year together to just go to many places
  • We can go to the National College Training
  • After this point it's pretty hard to even plan ahead for because everything after marriage that I'm considering is all based on a LOT of assumptions
